creator: xxjack12xx@gmail.com
text:
When MYSOFA is enabled, build fails with following:

cc -I. -I./ -DLIBICONV_PLUG -isystem /usr/local/include -D_ISOC99_SOURCE -D_FILE_OFFSET_BITS=64 -D_LARGEFILE_SOURCE -DPIC -DZLIB_CONST -DHAVE_AV_CONFIG_H -DBUILDING_avfilter -O2 -pipe -march=ivybridge  -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fstack-protector-strong -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing    -std=c11 -fomit-frame-pointer -fPIC -pthread  -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/p11-kit-1 -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/lilv-0 -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/serd-0 -I/usr/local/include/sord-0 -I/usr/local/include/sratom-0 -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/harfbuzz -I/usr/local/include/glib-2.0 -I/usr/local/lib/glib-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include/freetype2 -I/usr/local/include/libpng16 -I/usr/local/include/fribidi -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/libxml2 -I/usr/local/include/freetype2 -I/usr/local/include/libpng16 -I/usr/local/include/bs2b -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/glib-2.0 -I/usr/local/lib/glib-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/openjpeg-2.3 -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/opus -I/usr/local/include/opus -I/usr/local/include -D_REENTRANT -I/usr/local/include/librsvg-2.0 -I/usr/local/include/glib-2.0 -I/usr/local/lib/glib-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/gdk-pixbuf-2.0 -I/usr/local/include/cairo -I/usr/local/include/pixman-1 -I/usr/local/include/freetype2 -I/usr/local/include/libpng16 -I/usr/local/include/libdrm -D_THREAD_SAFE -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/vapoursynth -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/python3.6m -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/alsa -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -pthread -I/usr/local/include -pthread -I/usr/local/include -pthread -I/usr/local/include -pthread -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include libavfilter/af_superequalizer.d -MT libavfilter/af_superequalizer.o -c -o libavfilter/af_superequalizer.o libavfilter/af_superequalizer.c

libavfilter/af_sofalizer.c:166:32: error: implicit declaration of function 'mysofa_neighborhood_init_withstepdefine' is
      invalid in C99 [-Werror,-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
        s->sofa.neighborhood = mysofa_neighborhood_init_withstepdefine(s->sofa.hrtf,
                               ^
libavfilter/af_sofalizer.c:166:32: warning: this function declaration is not a prototype [-Wstrict-prototypes]
libavfilter/af_sofalizer.c:166:30: warning: incompatible integer to pointer conversion assigning to
      'struct MYSOFA_NEIGHBORHOOD *' from 'int' [-Wint-conversion]
        s->sofa.neighborhood = mysofa_neighborhood_init_withstepdefine(s->sofa.hrtf,
                             ^ ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
